history.title: Equation breakdowns, step-by-step, Handbook panel
changes: Relevant equations now shown up front on each question — solution stays hidden
Unlock the worked solution one step at a time
Searchable Handbook panel beside each question
New Question Bank: browse, search, and filter every question by topic/mastery

history.title: Progress, spaced repetition, settings
changes: Progress dashboard: per-section mastery, streak, days-to-exam, weakest sections
Leitner spaced repetition composes the daily set (due reviews + new)
Settings: daily size, new/review mix, reveal mode, SRS toggle, reset

history.title: Site live
changes: pefeprep.com live on GitHub Pages with auto-deploy
